publication_rule: A procedure must remain research_required until every electrical value, connection point, adapter and tool route has direct evidence.

vw_kessy_early_eeprom_read.title: Read early KESSY serial EEPROM
required_identification: PCB revision or clear PCB photographs
required_equipment: current-limited bench supply if the verified tool procedure requires module power
mandatory_backup_checks: save untouched original under VIN/job reference
warnings: Do not publish generic clip wiring because layouts and programmer pinouts vary.
Do not write to the original dump before verified backups exist.
If duplicate reads differ, stop and correct the connection or remove the device using an approved method.

vw_kessy_encrypted_adapter_read.title: Read encrypted KESSY with solder-free adapter
required_equipment: current-limited power supply where required by the tool maker
warnings: Adapter alignment must be confirmed from the exact PCB revision, not a similar photograph.
Never apply power until voltage and polarity are confirmed from evidence.
Do not assume all encrypted KESSY adapters support all board revisions.

vw_kessy_encrypted_wired_read.title: Read encrypted KESSY by wired bench connection
required_identification: verified wiring diagram for the exact board
warnings: No generic solder points are provided until exact board evidence is available.
Remove power before attaching or removing signal wires.
Photograph the board before and after work and restore all points cleanly.
